qas.a:
Light blue long / short sleeve shirt for men, blouse for women

Trousers for men and slacks / skirt for women

Footwear

Headgear

Buttons aligned with zipper

Outside of belt buckle

Edge of Fly

qas.q: Men's Long and Short Sleeved Shirts
qas.a:
Name tags centered, but not over edge of right pocket

Ribbons centered, but not over edge of left pocket
( All, some, or none may be worn )

Badges centered 1/2 inch above ribbons or 1/2 inch above left pocket ( if no ribbons are worn )

Aeronautical, chaplain, space, cyberspace & missile operation badges are mandatory all else is optional.

Insignia should be centered 3 1/2 inch or 4 inch chevrons halfway between shoulder seam and elbow when bent at 90 degrees.

Tie:
Long sleeve mandatory, belt must be centered in between belt buckle, tie clack is optional, must be centered

White undershirt must be worn and tucked into trousers

V-necks or athletic styles ( unless authorized to wear crew necks )

qas.q: Women's Long and Short Sleeved Blouses
qas.a:
Name tags centered to right, even with to 1 1/2 inches higher or lower than first exposed button.

Ribbons centered on right side aligned to the bottom of the name tag. ( All, some, or none may be worn )

Badges centered 1/2 inch above ribbons or parallel to nametag ( if no ribbons are worn )

Aeronautical, chaplain, space, cyberspace & missile operation badges are mandatory all else is optional.

Insignia should be centered 3 1/2 inch or 4 inch chevrons halfway between shoulder seam and elbow when bent at 90 degrees.

Tie tab:
Long sleeve mandatory, short sleeve optional

White undershirt may be worn and tucked into trousers

V-necks or athletic styles ( unless authorized to wear crew necks )

Back of trousers 7/8 inch longer than the front, straight, slight break in crease

Silver tip extends beyond buckle and faces wearer's left with no blue fabric showing.

Back of slacks 7/8 inch longer than the front, straight, slight break in crease

Skirt length no shorter than the top of kneecap or longer than bottom of kneecap

Silver tip extends beyond buckle and faces wearer's right with no blue fabric showing.

Black combat or dress boots ( Oxfords ) with black socks

Black pumps low cut and rounded throat with raised heel no longer than 3 inches. ( Women )

Must wear hose with skirt, may wear hose with black socks and slacks

Color must complement uniform and individual's skin tone

No patterns

Body hair can't be shown through hose

Worn aligned to the center of the forehead, in a straight line with the nose and cap approximately one inch from eyebrows.

Men: No hair showing & tucked on second belt loop when inside

Women: May have hair showing in front of flight cap; Can wear men's flight cap after BMT

Men: Visor type cap
Women: Rounded design

Worn squarely on the head, center the large insignia on the front of the cap
Worn like a beanie

Men - Tie, tie tack ( optional )

Women - Tie tab, must make sure blouse is not visible below the bottom of the service dress coat

Coat must be the same material as pants; with arms hanging naturally sleeves end approximately 1/4 inch from heel of thumb. Bottom edge of service coat should extend 3 to 3 1/2 inches below the top of the thigh and don't iron creases.

Nametag - Center on right side of service coat between sleeve seam and lapel; align bottom of nametag with the bottom of ribbons

US Insignia with Circles - Halfway up lapel seam, resting on, but not over the seam; horizontal to ground

Ribbons - Centered but not over edge of pocket

Badges - Centered 1/2 inch above ribbons or parallel to nametag ( if no ribbons are worn )

Aeronautical, chaplain, space, cyberspace & missile operation badges are mandatory all else is optional.

Additional badges 1/2 inch above the first badge

Chevrons - Center chevrons halfway between shoulder seam and elbow when arm is bent at 90 degree angle

May use 3 1/2 or 4 inch cloth chevrons
Must be removed inside with the exception of lightweight jacket and fleece.
Way be worn with or without liner, can use either chevron

Sleeves extend 1/2 inch Service Coat sleeves

Can't be shorter than 1/2 below knee or 6 inches longer crease of knee

Can button top button

Metal rank insignia 1 inch up from bottom edge of collar centered and parallel to outer edge of the collar

Neat and clean
Pressed
Serviceable
Free of strings and stains
Zipped snapped velcroed or buttoned appropriately

Stand or walk with hands in pockets
No headphones/ radio when walking
No eating or drinking or smoking or using tobacco when walking

Nice haircut
Clean shave all around face

Natural hair color
Hair accessories must match hair color
Pinned up hair must prevent loose ends
Bun completely tucked in and secured ( no wider than head )
Single ponytail doesn't exceed bulk and length standards
Locs / braids must not be longer wider than 1 inch, with natural space and tightly interwoven
Nail polish and lipstick must be a single color and compliment skin tone

US Flag centered on right side stop ( Organizational Unit may be below flag and centered )
Nametag on right side, U.S. Air Force on left side
Pockets secured, belt on, blousing straps used.
Must be worn with OCP shirt tucked ( Women wear bras as well )
Must be coyote brown and laces tucked in
499 Riggers belt to be worn with OCP uniform
One only

One only, no wider than 1/2 inch, gold or silver
Traditional POW / MIA bracelets authorized
Medical alert bracelets must meet standards
Bracelets supporting groups are not authorized
No ankle bracelet

3 three rings on both hands combined ( Wedding ring counts as one )
No thumb rings
Worn at base of finger
Concealed under shirts, not visible
Concealed under shirts, not visible
Must be approved by CC or Chaplain

In uniform ( cannot )
Off duty you can ( on / off base installation )

Won't exceed 6 mm in diameter
Round or square white diamond, god, white, or silver earrings
If member has multiple holes, one set will be worn on lower earlobe
Matching earrings must be worn and fit tightly, without extending below the earlobe
If worn on belt it'll be black, silver, dark blue or gray ( same with a holster or purse )
In pen / pencil pockets provided in OCP uniform

Frame is silver or black
Not worn around neck or top or back of head or exposed hanging on uniform
Normal in color
Plain black

qas.q: Handbag, Purse, Attache Case, Gym Bag, Backpack
qas.a: All black & must not interfere with rendering a proper salute
Must be all black
